title: fragaria vesca var. semperflorens
intro: Fragaria vesca var. semperflorens, also known as the ever-bearing wood strawberry, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the rose family and produces edible strawberries throughout the year. The medicinal properties of Fragaria vesca var. semperflorens include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of consuming this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. Fragaria vesca var. semperflorens can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote digestion, relieve stress, and boost overall well-being.
